---
title: "Project Poster"
subtitle: "IS428 AY2025/26 Term 2 — Submitted 8 April 2026"
---

## Revised Poster

Revised after incorporating feedback from the poster session evaluation.

<img src="./images/VA Poster (new).jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto;" alt="Tableau Schedule">

*Revised A1 poster — improvements based on peer evaluation feedback*

---

## Original Poster

Submitted and presented at the IS428 class poster session on 13 April 2026.

<img src="./images/VA Poster (old).jpg" style="width: 100%; height: auto;" alt="Tableau Schedule">

*Original A1 poster — submitted 8 April 2026*

---

## Poster Session Feedback

The poster was presented at the IS428 class session on 13 April 2026. Four groups provided written evaluations.

**What worked well:**

- The core message — bias comes from selective omission, not fabricated data — was clearly communicated and consistently understood across all evaluators
- Key insights panels were highlighted as an effective way to draw quick conclusions before engaging with the group
- The lollipop/bias bar chart was noted for giving a clear picture of each member's sentiment range at a glance
- Good variety of chart types and effective use of colour and legends

**Areas for improvement:**

- A brief context introduction was missing — several evaluators needed to ask for background before they could interpret the poster
- The sentiment heatmap was difficult to read due to many null values; a cleaner chart or alternative visual was suggested
- Some charts were too small to read comfortably at poster size
- Colour palette was perceived as inconsistent across the project
- Axis titles on the sentiment chart were not renamed from defaults
